title: Changing domain names and email accounts - Migrate
excerpt: Monday account was originally set up under abc@xyz.com, but we are now changing the company name to xyz@abc.com. How can we migrate users, boards, etc?

posts.author: DenverDTS (LanceH)
posts.cookedHtml: Monday account was originally set up under abc@xyz.com, but we are now changing the company name to xyz@abc.com. How can we migrate users, boards, etc?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @DenverDTS! The admin of the account should be able to make the necessary changes via the admin settings: How to change your account URL and name

As for emails, the admin has the ability to change the email addresses of each user or the user can make the change from within their own accounts.

  • How to manage users on your account
  • How to change your email or password
